title: Add oscore_ctx_persist_ssn call on success path of oscore_protect_request
description: After successful encryption, AAD, option build in oscore_protect_request (oscore.c), call oscore_ctx_persist_ssn(ctx) before returning OSCORE_OK. Update ret handling and move cleanup accordingly. Reference oscore.c:1490-1520.
close_reason: Implemented: oscore_ctx_persist_ssn(ctx) called on success path after option build in oscore_protect_request (replaces direct OSCORE_OK assignment so NVM errors propagate). Ret and cleanup handling updated per spec. Verified in oscore.c:1522.
